mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.cart_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, cart_id, customer_id, customer_name, customer_email, session_id, subtotal, currency, coupon_codes, discount_amount, total, item_count, expires_at, notes, description, state_id, flow_id, state_entry_time, sla_yellow_date, sla_red_date, sla_tending_late, sla_late, created_time, last_modified_time, last_modified_by, created_by, version ) SELECT c.id, c.tenant, NOW(), c.id, c.customer_id, COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || COALESCE(u.last_name, ''), ''), u.email, c.session_id, c.subtotal, c.currency, c.coupon_codes, c.discount_amount, c.total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_cart.cart_item ci2 WHERE ci2.cart_id = c.id), c.expires_at, c.notes, c.description, c.state_id, c.flow_id, c.state_entry_time, c.sla_yellow_date, c.sla_red_date, c.sla_tending_late, c.sla_late, c.created_time, c.last_modified_time, c.last_modified_by, c.created_by, c.version FROM hm_cart.cart c LEFT JOIN hm_user.user_profiles u ON c.customer_id = u.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.cart_items_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, item_id, cart_id, customer_id, cart_state, cart_subtotal, cart_currency, cart_coupon_codes, cart_discount, cart_total, product_id, variant_id, sku, product_name, brand, product_slug, category_name, supplier_id, quantity, unit_price, line_total, variant_color, variant_size, image_url, available_quantity, stock_status, created_time, last_modified_time ) SELECT ci.id, c.tenant, NOW(), ci.id, ci.cart_id, c.customer_id, c.state_id, c.subtotal, c.currency, c.coupon_codes, c.discount_amount, c.total, ci.product_id, ci.variant_id, ci.sku, COALESCE(p.name, ci.product_name), p.brand, p.slug, cat.name, ci.supplier_id, ci.quantity, ci.unit_price, ci.line_total, va_color.attribute_value, va_size.attribute_value, COALESCE(vma.cdn_url, vma.original_url, pma.cdn_url, pma.original_url), inv.available_quantity, inv.status, ci.created_time, ci.last_modified_time FROM hm_cart.cart_item ci JOIN hm_cart.cart c ON ci.cart_id = c.id LEFT JOIN hm_product.products p ON p.id = ci.product_id LEFT JOIN hm_product.categories cat ON cat.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN hm_product.variant_attributes va_color ON va_color.variant_id = ci.variant_id AND va_color.attribute_key = 'color' LEFT JOIN hm_product.variant_attributes va_size ON va_size.variant_id = ci.variant_id AND va_size.attribute_key = 'size' LEFT JOIN hm_product.variant_media vm ON vm.variant_id = ci.variant_id AND vm.is_primary = true LEFT JOIN hm_product.media_assets vma ON vma.id = vm.asset_id LEFT JOIN hm_product.product_media pm ON pm.product_id = ci.product_id AND pm.is_primary = true LEFT JOIN hm_product.media_assets pma ON pma.id = pm.asset_id LEFT JOIN hm_inventory.inventory_item inv ON inv.variant_id = ci.variant_id

INSERT INTO hm_query.cart_activity_flat ( id, tenant, cart_id, activity_name, activity_success, activity_comment, created_time, created_by ) SELECT a.id, c.tenant, a.cart_id, a.activity_name, a.activity_success, a.activity_comment, a.created_time, a.created_by FROM hm_cart.cart_activity_log a JOIN hm_cart.cart c ON a.cart_id = c.id WHERE a.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
